domain_description: Assesses whether the business has the strategic clarity, ownership, operating discipline, management cadence, reporting, and systems foundation required to scale with control.
audit_focus: better strategic execution, faster decisions, and stronger operating discipline

domain_description: Assesses whether the business consistently creates, captures, qualifies, routes, and measures inbound and outbound demand in a way that supports efficient pipeline growth.
audit_focus: more qualified demand, less leakage before sales, and better channel ROI

domain_description: Assesses whether sales opportunities are qualified, progressed, priced, followed up, governed, and converted through a repeatable commercial process that protects win rate and margin.
audit_focus: higher win rates, stronger pricing discipline, and cleaner forecasting

domain_description: Assesses whether sold work is delivered consistently, profitably, on time, and to standard, with clear handoffs, delivery controls, and operational visibility.
audit_focus: better activation, delivery quality, and retention

domain_description: Assesses whether earned revenue is accurately triggered, recorded, invoiced, and protected from leakage through disciplined billing controls and event capture.
audit_focus: faster billing, fewer billing errors, and less unbilled work

domain_description: Assesses whether invoiced revenue is converted into cash efficiently through effective collections, credit control, dispute resolution, and debtor management.
audit_focus: lower DSO, better collections, and reduced bad debt risk

domain_description: Assesses whether the business protects recurring and existing revenue by managing customer health, service continuity, renewals, expansion, and commercial relationship ownership.
audit_focus: lower churn, stronger renewal conversion, and more expansion revenue

domain_description: Assesses whether finance, people, systems, governance, reporting, and support functions strengthen execution, decision-making, compliance, and scale readiness across the business.
audit_focus: higher operating resilience, stronger governance, and cleaner data for decisions
